controllers.name: cured_root_controller
controllers.description: Standard CURED controller for root entities (no parent relationships)

controllers.name: cured_child_controller
controllers.description: CURED controller for child entities with parent-scoped operations

controllers.name: many_to_many_controller_enhancement
controllers.description: Additional operations for models with many-to-many relationships

template.content:
# Additional many-to-many operations
{{#each relationships.manyToManyRelationships}}associate_with_{{targetModel}}:
  parameters:
    {{../modelName}}Id: UUID # required
    {{targetModel}}Id: UUID # required
    associationData: Object # optional
  returns: Boolean
  requires:
    - "{{../modelName}} with ID exists"
    - "{{targetModel}} with ID exists"
    - "Association does not already exist"
  ensures:
    - "{{../modelName}} associated with {{targetModel}}"
    - "Association data stored if provided"
  publishes:
    - {{../modelName}}AssociatedWith{{targetModel}}
disassociate_from_{{targetModel}}:
  parameters:
    {{../modelName}}Id: UUID # required
    {{targetModel}}Id: UUID # required
  returns: Boolean
  requires:
    - "{{../modelName}} with ID exists"
    - "{{targetModel}} with ID exists"
    - "Association exists"
  ensures:
    - "{{../modelName}} disassociated from {{targetModel}}"
    - "Association data removed"
  publishes:
    - {{../modelName}}DisassociatedFrom{{targetModel}}
list_{{targetModel}}_associations:
  parameters:
    {{../modelName}}Id: UUID # required
    filters: AssociationFilter # optional
  returns: Array[{{targetModel}}Association]
  requires:
    - "{{../modelName}} with ID exists"
  ensures:
    - "Returns all {{targetModel}} associations for {{../modelName}}"
    - "Includes association metadata"{{/each}}

controllers.name: profile_aware_controller
controllers.description: Additional operations for models with profile attachments

template.content:
# Profile attachment operations
attach_profile:
  parameters:
    {{modelName}}Id: UUID # required
    profileType: String # required
    profileData: Object # required
  returns: ProfileAttachment
  requires:
    - "{{modelName}} with ID exists"
    - "Profile type is supported"
    - "Profile data is valid for type"
  ensures:
    - "Profile attached to {{modelName}}"
    - "Profile data validated against profile schema"
  publishes:
    - ProfileAttachedTo{{modelName}}

detach_profile:
  parameters:
    {{modelName}}Id: UUID # required
    profileType: String # required
  returns: Boolean
  requires:
    - "{{modelName}} with ID exists"
    - "Profile attachment exists"
  ensures:
    - "Profile detached from {{modelName}}"
    - "Profile-specific data removed"
  publishes:
    - ProfileDetachedFrom{{modelName}}

update_profile:
  parameters:
    {{modelName}}Id: UUID # required
    profileType: String # required
    profileUpdates: Object # required
  returns: ProfileAttachment
  requires:
    - "{{modelName}} with ID exists"
    - "Profile attachment exists"
    - "Profile updates are valid"
  ensures:
    - "Profile data updated"
    - "Profile version incremented"
  publishes:
    - ProfileUpdatedOn{{modelName}}

list_profiles:
  parameters:
    {{modelName}}Id: UUID # required
  returns: Array[ProfileAttachment]
  requires:
    - "{{modelName}} with ID exists"
  ensures:
    - "Returns all profiles attached to {{modelName}}"
    - "Includes profile metadata and versions"
